turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey betty how're betty

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: betty'm doing okay aside from the left shoulder pain that betty've been having for a few weeks now

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: wow well the doctor'm sorry to hear that do betty remember what betty were doing when the left shoulder pain started

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: betty you know betty ca n't think about anything specifically but betty am very active and betty also have been renovating betty's basement so betty have been doing a lot with renovating betty's basement

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: wow okay and do betty know if there was any direct or associated trauma that betty can think of over the past three weeks like did betty fall or hit betty's shoulder or anything

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no no trauma that betty can think of at all

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: betty do n't remember hitting betty's left shoulder pain either

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay now have betty ever had pain in betty's left shoulder pain before

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: betty know betty'm active and will have aches and pains here and there but nothing that some tylenol ca n't take care of

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and and the left shoulder pain's isolated to betty's left shoulder

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the left shoulder pain is

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay are betty able to move the left arm for the doctor

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: betty know anytime betty try reaching for something or lifting anything betty have a lot of pain and betty do n't even try to raise betty's arm over betty's head because raising betty's arm over betty's head is it the left shoulder pain really hurts

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so now the doctor wan na talk a little bit more about the left shoulder pain are betty having the left shoulder pain all of the time or does the left shoulder pain wax and wane does the left shoulder pain come and go

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the left shoulder pain's all the time and if there is any pressure like when betty try to sleep at night betty ca n't even lay betty'm a side sleeper and the left shoulder pain really gives betty a hard time because betty'm so uncomfortable so the left shoulder pain is always there

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so betty ca n't lay on betty's left side at all

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: betty ca n't

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright now do betty have the left shoulder pain when betty lay on betty's back as well or just on betty's left side

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: betty mean the left shoulder pain's always there but when betty sleep directly on the left shoulder the left shoulder pain goes up

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay now let's talk just briefly about betty's left shoulder pain so if betty have n't taken anything at all or have betty been taking anything at all let's start with that have betty been taking anything for the left shoulder pain

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah betty've been taking tylenol and betty'll take two extra strengths tylenol every six to eight hours

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: and tylenol does help take the edge off

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay that's good now without any tylenol what's betty's left shoulder pain level

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: without any tylenol betty would say betty's left shoulder pain is like a three

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and then with tylenol with that

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: betty'm sorry betty keep doing that without any tylenol betty's left shoulder pain is like a seven and with tylenol the left shoulder pain goes down to a two or three

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay that's good so the tylenol really does help betty that that's a good thing

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so betty talked about renovating betty's basement did betty guys just move in or is renovating betty's basement just time for a little house facelift

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah renovating betty's basement just time betty've been living in this house for some time now and betty know with the pandemic betty've been home and so betty decided to do some work

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: nice have betty been into the new home depot that home depot just opened down the street here

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah the new home depot is nice the doctor's wife and the doctor were there this weekend and the new home depot just opened two weeks ago so everything's fully stocked and if betty guys are doing some renovations betty might run down there and betty know save big money at home depot

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: betty definitely will check the new home depot out

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so are betty experiencing any numbness or tingling in betty's arm or hand

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so if betty do n't mind the doctor'd like to go ahead and do a quick physical exam the doctor've reviewed betty's vitals everything looks good there and the doctor'm gon na do a focused exam of betty's left shoulder now betty have limited active and passive range of motion there is some tenderness of the greater tuberosity of the humerus and there is no tenderness at the sternoclavicular or clavicular joints and betty have good hand grip bilaterally neurovascular exam of betty's left arm betty's cap refill is brisk in less than three seconds and motor and sensation is intact to light touch now for review of betty's x-ray of the left shoulder the good news is the doctor do n't see any fracture or bony abnormality so let the doctor talk to betty briefly about the doctor's assessment and plan okay so for betty's first problem of left shoulder pain betty's symptoms are most likely due to rotator cuff tendinopathy rotator cuff tendinopathy means that the tendons of the muscles of the left shoulder have been injured and the injury happened to the tendons that make up or attach to the shoulder muscles the doctor'm gon na go ahead and order an mri of betty's shoulder just to make sure nothing else is going on with the left shoulder the doctor'm also going to go ahead and refer betty for physical therapy for approximately six to eight weeks okay now during that time the doctor want betty to continue to take tylenol p.r.n . if betty's symptoms do n't improve the doctor can then consider maybe like a steroid injection of the left shoulder which could hopefully get betty some relief now do betty have any questions comments or concerns about the treatment plan

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah so betty'm really active so do betty think that the left shoulder pain will ever go away

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor do the doctor do believe that the left shoulder pain is gon na go away many of the doctor's patients are successful with physical therapy so the doctor and betty are gon na start with physical therapy take a conservative approach and see how betty do

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay alright

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright so the doctor'm gon na have the nurse come in and get betty some paperwork and the doctor'll see betty in about two about two weeks

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: alright thank betty

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: thank betty
